name: Cheddar Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt together into a large bowl.
2. Mix in the grated cheddar cheese.
3. Cut the butter into small pieces and add them to the dry mixture. Stir until well combined.
4. Gradually stir in the milk until the dough is soft and holds together without sticking to the spoon.
5. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Knead lightly for about 30 seconds, just enough to bring it together.
6. Pat the dough into an even thickness of about 3/8 inch.
7. Cut the dough into portions that can be easily handled.
8. Place the biscuits on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
9. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for approximately 30 minutes, or until lightly browned and cooked through.
Serving suggestion: Serve immediately while warm.
